overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic sports car through Night City during a rainy night. The player drives from elevated highways through Kabuki and Little China districts, transitioning through tunnels and underground parking before reaching the Arasaka Waterfront corporate district.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with red structural arches descending into Kabuki district

events.description: descending from elevated highway ramp to street level in Kabuki district
district signage changes from Kabuki to Little China

agents.ego_description: navigating a futuristic sports car down from elevated highways through the rain-soaked Kabuki district

entered.detail: large red structural arches supporting the elevated highway
green-tinted concrete noise barriers lining the highway
illuminated district signage and holographic advertisements for Kabuki

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed descent from an elevated highway characterized by massive red structural arches. The car navigates through heavy rain on wet asphalt, passing green sound barriers as it transitions from the elevated roadway into the Kabuki district, with neon signage visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed highway tunnel with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering darker tunnel section with artificial fluorescent lighting replacing ambient city light
accelerating to high speed through the tunnel, reaching 60+ km/h

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the Little China highway tunnel, passing under holographic billboards at high speed

entered.detail: text overlay indicating entry into Little China district
smooth concrete walls of the highway tunnel with reflective strips
large suspended digital advertisements displaying animated content
illuminated signage for El Guapo visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving through the Little China district, the car enters a high-speed highway tunnel with concrete walls and artificial lighting. Holographic billboards float overhead as the vehicle accelerates, transitioning from the open highway into the enclosed tunnel environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking structure with tight ramps and concrete pillars

events.description: exiting highway tunnel into underground parking garage structure
slowing down and navigating tight turns in the parking structure

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating tight turns and ramps in an underground parking structure, approaching the Arasaka building

notable_agents.action: person walking near the parking garage exit ramp

entered.detail: bare concrete walls of the multi-level parking structure
street sign indicating California Ave direction
large illuminated Arasaka corporate logo on the wall
harsh white fluorescent tube lighting on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The car exits the highway tunnel into a narrow underground parking structure with concrete walls and fluorescent lighting. The driver navigates tight turns and ramps, passing a glowing Arasaka corporate logo on the wall while slowing down for the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka Waterfront corporate district with security checkpoints

events.description: exiting underground parking to street level at Arasaka Waterfront district
approaching the Arasaka building security checkpoint with barriers

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked streets of the Arasaka Waterfront district, approaching the corporate headquarters

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with headlights on driving ahead on the wet road

entered.detail: text overlay indicating Arasaka Waterfront district
massive corporate building with illuminated Arasaka logo at the entrance
concrete and metal barriers lining the corporate district street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underground parking, the car emerges into the rain-soaked Arasaka Waterfront district. The massive Arasaka building facade dominates the view ahead, with its glowing corporate logo growing larger as the vehicle approaches the security checkpoint. Street lights reflect off the wet pavement as the car navigates toward the corporate entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey from the sprawling elevated highways of Night City into the sterile, imposing corporate heart of the Arasaka Waterfront. It begins with a descent from massive red structural arches through heavy rain and green sound barriers, transitioning from the open roadway into the neon-lit Kabuki district. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene shifts from the open air into a high-speed highway tunnel where concrete walls and floating holographic billboards replace the city skyline. The camera then moves from the tunnel into the confined, fluorescent lighting of an underground parking structure, navigating tight ramps and passing a glowing corporate logo. Finally, the car emerges from the underground darkness back into the rain-soaked streets, where the massive facade of the Arasaka building looms ahead as the vehicle approaches the security checkpoint.
